articles.title: Home of the Week: Brand new single-family house in West Roxbury for $1.65m
articles.description:
The home is located in The Preserve at Cardinal Hill, a new subdivision.

The post Home of the Week: Brand new single-family house in West Roxbury for $1.65m appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: New single-family house listed for $1.65 million in West Roxbury.
Located in The Preserve at Cardinal Hill subdivision.
Potential increase in local property values and neighborhood development.

articles.title: Boston’s innovation economy hits a new milestone in global rankings
articles.description:
A record number of Boston-area firms were named on the LexisNexis list.

The post Boston’s innovation economy hits a new milestone in global rankings appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston-area firms achieved record representation on the LexisNexis global rankings list.
Over 50 local companies were recognized for their innovation contributions.
This milestone boosts Boston's reputation as a leading hub for technology and entrepreneurship.
